_version.description: The version id, normally returned by the API when the item was retrieved. Use it ensure updates are done against the latest version.

list_id.description: The exception list's human-readable string identifier.

meta.description: Placeholder for metadata about the list container.

name.description: The name of the exception list.

namespace_type.description: Determines whether the exception container is available in all Kibana spaces or just the space

os_types.description: Use this field to specify the operating system. Only enter one value.

tags.description: String array containing words and phrases to help categorize exception containers.

type.description: The type of exception list to be created. Different list types may denote where they can be utilized.

kb-version.description: The document version, automatically increasd on updates.
